name: gsb.lock
description: Known-good version tuple for the Governed Second Brain stack — Compile (ICO) x Govern (INTKB) x Retrieve (qmd) x the plugin. The installer pins to these; CI (.github/workflows/smoke.yml) drives the full chain against them before release. Bump deliberately: never drift one component without re-running the smoke over the whole chain.

plugin.name: governed-second-brain
plugin.role: Claude Code + Cowork plugin — local stdio MCP (read + write) + the npx installer.

compile.name: intentional-cognition-os
compile.role: ICO — corpus -> governance spool (DeepSeek- or Anthropic-capable). The installer's --index-only mode skips it for a zero-egress build.

govern.name: qmd-team-intent-kb
govern.role: INTKB — deterministic dedupe -> policy -> promote + the SHA-256 hash-chained audit + external anchor. Private monorepo; compiled into plugin-runtime/governed-brain.cjs, never published to a registry.

retrieve.name: qmd
retrieve.role: tobi's qmd — on-device hybrid search (BM25 + vector + LLM rerank). External PATH prerequisite; every hit is a qmd:// citation. Govern degrades gracefully if absent (capture/promote/audit still complete; only the post-promote index refresh waits).

verifiedBy: .github/workflows/smoke.yml — capture -> govern -> audit-verify (hermetic, zero LLM egress) + best-effort qmd-cited search.
